steps: "Contact Danske Bank Custody to request application of 15% DK-NO treaty rate instead of 25% standard rate on Novo Nordisk dividend",
"Submit formal tax reclaim to Danish Tax Administration (Skat) for excess withholding of DKK 153,600 using their dividend tax refund process",
"Provide documentation of Norwegian tax residency and treaty eligibility to support the 15% rate claim",
"Follow up with custodian on implementing Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement procedures for future Danish dividend payments"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
